channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: e7ebe2d9-6e26-487a-8286-191d623a6904
Display name: PrivilegedAccess-CustomExt.Read.All
Description: Read Privileged Access (PIM) custom extensions
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/e7ebe2d9-6e26-487a-8286-191d623a6904

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 124325f3-0c46-4c57-a050-d6d1a82510f6
Display name: PrivilegedAccess-CustomExt.ReadWrite.All
Description: Read and write Privileged Access (PIM) custom extensions
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/124325f3-0c46-4c57-a050-d6d1a82510f6
